# Ada's Closet

> Ada's Closet is a student-run clothing consignment service based at Spring Arbor University (SAU) in Spring Arbor, Michigan. We help people turn unwanted clothes into cash — for free.

## What We Do

Ada's Closet accepts drop-offs of clothes, shoes, and accessories, then lists and sells them on Depop, eBay, and Poshmark. Consignors earn a minimum of 30% of the final sale price, paid via Venmo or CashApp. There is no upfront cost to consign.

## Who We Serve

- Students and residents of Spring Arbor, MI and Jackson, MI
- Anyone looking to sell secondhand clothing without managing their own listings
- People who want to participate in sustainable fashion and reduce clothing waste

## Key Facts

- Consignors earn: ≥30% of final sale price
- Platforms we sell on: Depop, eBay, Poshmark
- Payout method: Venmo or CashApp
- Drop-off location: Spring Arbor University, Spring Arbor, MI
- Pickup available: Spring Arbor and Jackson, MI area (small fee)
- Upfront cost: Free
- Run by: Students at Spring Arbor University, Marketing & Entrepreneurship Hub

## How It Works

1. Sign up at adascloset.thesauhub.com
2. Drop off your bag of clothes at Spring Arbor University
3. We photograph, price, and list every item on Depop, eBay, and Poshmark
4. When an item sells, you receive at least 30% of the sale price via Venmo or CashApp

- FAQ: https://adascloset.thesauhub.com/#faq
- Sign Up: https://adascloset.thesauhub.com/#signup
